professionalSummary: With 3+ years of experience building solutions for e-commerce, I create web applications that drive real business results. Proficient in HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React, I recently re-architected a company's web presence, leading to a 35% increase in online sales and a 40% boost in organic traffic through targeted development and SEO.

workExperience.title: Web Developer
responsibilities: Developed a production-ready marketplace using Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, converting a Hackathon concept into a scalable web application.
Implemented a comprehensive error handling system with custom reusable components, improving user experience by providing context-aware feedback for all HTTP status codes.
Established a three-tier deployment pipeline on Google Cloud Platform, automating builds and enhancing security by integrating Google Secret Manager to eliminate hardcoded tokens.

workExperience.title: Ecommerce Specialist
responsibilities: Redesigned website entirely on the Shopify platform, implementing a modern UI and custom JavaScript features that contributed to a 35% increase in online sales.
Drove a 40% increase in organic traffic within six months by executing a targeted SEO strategy, focusing on keyword optimization for product descriptions and creating high-ranking landing pages.

workExperience.title: Business Development Executive
responsibilities: Executed a multichannel digital marketing strategy, utilizing Facebook ads and marketplace positioning to drive a 35% increase in overall sales.
Expanded the customer base by 30% by securing sponsorships and representation at high-end events, significantly boosting brand awareness and market penetration.

workExperience.title: Web Developer
responsibilities: Overhauled the agency's website UI/UX on the Squarespace platform, integrating an automated calendar booking system that directly increased the volume of inbound client discovery calls by 50%.
achievements: 50% increase in inbound client discovery calls

education.degree: Bachelor Of Applied Science (BASc) In Computer Science

projects.name: Agri-Tourism Marketplace
description: Developed the initial prototype for an agritourism platform during an 8-hour hackathon, focusing on core user flows for browsing and viewing tour details.
Built a mock back-end using Node.js and Express to serve JSON data from local files, simulating a live API for the front-end to consume.
